name: Dharma

skills.name: Heart Meridian Mantra
skills.description: When using skills, he gains Physical and Magical Defense,as well as enhanced basic atacks that inflict extra damage and slow.

skills.name: Formlessness Mantra
skills.description: Dashes forward, dealing damage to enemies and crowd controling them.

skills.name: Enlightenment Mantra
skills.description: Damages enemies in front of him and recovers health

skills.name: Truth Mantra
skills.description: Damages nearby enemies and knocks them back.If an enemy is knocked back into a wall , they take extra damage and are stunned.

tips: Dharma is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.2% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Axe of Torment → Frostscar's Embrace → Immovable - Sky Dome → Demonsbane → Starbreaker.
Run Mutation for stats that match Dharma's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Formlessness Mantra → Enlightenment Mantra → Truth Mantra → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Dharma excels into Wang Zhaojun, Han Xin. Avoid blind picking into Xiang Yu, Diaochan without team peel.

Dharma sits at Tier B globally (52.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Dharma good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Dharma is Tier B Tank with 52.2% win rate, 0.2% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Dharma build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, Immovable - Sky Dome, Demonsbane, Starbreaker. Run Mutation arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Dharma?
faqs.answer: Pick Xiang Yu, Diaochan into Dharma. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Dharma completes core items. Dharma struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Dharma counter?
faqs.answer: Dharma is strong into Wang Zhaojun, Han Xin according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Dharma when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Dharma good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Dharma sits at Tier B globally (52.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Dharma play?
faqs.answer: Dharma is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Fighter, Tank). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Dharma?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mutation arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Dharma or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Dharma vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Dharma has +0.8% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Dharma when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Dharma?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Tank picks unless targeting a one-trick.
